title: Border expands per Achievement
description: Every achievement expands the world border! A lightweight, lag-free datapack.
body:
# Border Expands per Achievement

Every achievement expands the world border! A lightweight, lag-free datapack with a hybrid Nether-scaling system optimized for multiplayer co-op.

---

## How It Works
1. **Starting Size:** The world starts as a **50x50 block area** (Radius: 25) centered at `0, 0`.
2. **Expansion:** Every advancement earned by *any* player instantly expands the border.
3. **The Math:** Each milestone increases the border **diameter by 50 blocks** (adding **25 blocks to the radius**). 
   * *0 Achievements:* 50x50 (Radius 25)
   * *1 Achievement:* 100x100 (Radius 50)
   * *2 Achievements:* 150x150 (Radius 75)
